title: Stock by branch
description: Catalog quantities per branch. Manual adjustments stay in this table until a kardex exists.

sin_sedes.title: No active branches
sin_sedes.description: Create at least one active branch in settings to assign stock per location.

import.title: Bulk stock upload
import.description: Download the Excel template, set branch and quantity per product, then upload to update stock.
import.template_hint: The file includes three sheets with Excel table formatting.
import.sheet_stock: Stock — rows to import (sede* and cantidad* required)
import.sheet_catalogos: Catalogos — BRANCHES (list value for the dropdown)
import.required_hint: Required: sede* and cantidad*. Identify the product with sku, name or barcode.
import.upload_hint: Select the completed file. You’ll see results row by row.
import.results_empty: Updated stock rows and errors will appear here.
import.error_generic: Could not import the file. Please try again.

lotes_dialog.title: Lots at branch
lotes_dialog.subtitle: {{producto}}
lotes_dialog.vacio: No lots with available quantity at this branch.

empty.no_records_description: Add products under Inventory › Products to see stock here.
empty.no_results_description: Try different search terms or review your filters.

search_placeholder: Search by name, SKU, barcode or description…

adjust.title: Adjust stock
adjust.description: Set the available quantity at the selected branch for this product.
adjust.cantidad_invalid: Enter a valid quantity (a number greater than or equal to 0).
